evidence: The modularization of SpedImageApp into src/app/ has significantly improved the codebase's architectural health by separating orchestration, state, and services.
Dependency direction is mostly linear: main -> lib -> app -> {gpu_renderer, image_backend, ui}.
The src/app/types.rs file acts as a clean boundary for shared primitives and events.
Remaining minor issue: gpu_renderer.rs and image_backend.rs still represent large hub modules that could be further decomposed.

issues.summary: gpu_renderer.rs and image_backend.rs remain monolithic hub modules
evidence: These files are large (1560 and 846 LOC respectively) and handle multiple distinct concerns within their subsystems.
issues.suggestion: Decompose gpu_renderer.rs into a src/render/ package and image_backend.rs into a src/image/ package, following the same pattern as src/app/.

root_causes: Initial project layout focused on monolithic files for simplicity.
likely_symptoms: High complexity scores for backend modules and difficulty in targeted testing.
